Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: How customers feel about the overall level of their bill — whether it is too high acceptable or a good value.
Sub_Topic: Bill Is Too High / Too Expensive
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer states bill or prices are too high too expensive or unaffordable. Include: 'too expensive' 'bill is too high' 'paying too much' 'prices are too high' 'my bill is high' 'very expensive' 'bill too high' 'muy caro el servicio' 'costs too much' 'overpriced' 'can't afford this'. Primary pricing dissatisfier — track monthly for trend.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: How customers feel about the overall level of their bill — whether it is too high acceptable or a good value.
Sub_Topic: Request to Lower Bill / Reduce Costs
Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer explicitly requests bill reduction or cheaper options — distinct from stating it's too high by making a direct request. Include: 'lower my bill' 'lower my phone bill' 'reduce my bill' 'need lower prices' 'cheaper prices' 'lower the cost' 'lower your rates' 'need my bill lower' 'bring my bill down' 'get my payment lower'. Direct churn prevention signal — retention opportunity.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
Topic_Definition: Feedback specifically about bills going up or unexpected price increases — month over month or mid-contract.

Sub_Topic_Definition: Customer reports unexpected bill increase without explanation or consent. Track month-over-month for anomaly detection.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.

Category_Definition: Feedback about cost pricing fees billing charges or the perceived value of AT&T products and services.
